summary: Iteration 76: FULL BUTTON & NAVIGATION TEST + NEW FEATURES. Verified ALL navigation buttons, gamified ranking with badges in Dashboard Barrio, referral code validation in Panel Vecinal. Backend 22/22 tests PASS. Frontend all flows working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Leaflet map shows '_leaflet_pos' error overlay on initial load. COSMETIC ONLY - page content renders correctly behind overlay.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - known from iteration 75, cosmetic, page still functional

issues: Note: Main homepage (HighConversionLanding) uses different header than LandingHeader.jsx. The 'Dashboard Barrio' button with data-testid is in LandingHeader which appears on subpages like /escudo-vecinal, not on root /. This is by design - different landing pages use different headers.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix Leaflet '_leaflet_pos' error overlay in PublicDashboardPage MiniMap (cosmetic issue, page works)

test_credentials.note: No auth required for tested features - public endpoints

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 tested ALL buttons and navigation across the app. Key new features: 1) Gamified ranking with badges in Dashboard Barrio (scores, badges, next milestone), 2) Referral code validation/redemption in Panel Vecinal paywall. All CTAs between pages work correctly.

homepage_header.Note: Main homepage uses HighConversionLanding with different header. Dashboard Barrio button is in LandingHeader used on subpages.

enterprise_central.Dashboard tab with metrics: PASS - Shows usuarios, suscripciones, empleados, newsletter
enterprise_central.CRM Ventas tab: PASS - Table with status dropdowns, filters, Nuevo Lead button
enterprise_central.Lead creation modal: PASS - Form works, lead appears in table
enterprise_central.Instalaciones tab: PASS - List with Programar button, status badges

api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/dashboard-barrio/ranking: PASS - Returns scores, overall_rank, badges, next_milestone

mocked_apis_note: Push notifications via pywebpush may not deliver without VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY. All other APIs are real and functional.
